T0084.title: Redirect / Oauth Account
T0084.definition: Commonly refers to Weibo/WeChat/QQ authorized accounts. Typically, the original account has already been used for bulk operations such as fake engagement or promo abuse and has been flagged as risky by the platform, which restricts its functionality. However, it can still be used to authorize logins on other platforms and is sold at low prices by cybercriminals in illegal data trading.
